_comment: Cursor MCP configuration for JP Bids MCP + J-Grants MCP integration.
_comment_jgrants: J-Grants MCP must be running locally first: cd jgrants-mcp-server && python -m jgrants_mcp_server.core

jp-bids._comment: Remote JP Bids MCP. Streamable HTTP is natively supported in Cursor.

jgrants._comment: Local J-Grants MCP (digital-go-jp/jgrants-mcp-server). Start it before opening Cursor.
